title: Array Arithmetic Operations and Size Calculation

content.problemStatement:
Write a program to compute and display the sum, average, and product of 5 integers in an array. Use the `sizeof()` operator to find the array size in bytes and perform an arithmetic operation by adding the size to the sum.

---
**Expected Output:**

```default
Size of the array in bytes: 20
Sum of elements: 150
Average of elements: 30
Result of size + sum of elements: 170
```
